```idris
module Main
import Hedgehog
import MSet1
import Base
import Combinatorics

genNode : Gen MSet1
genNode = do
  n <- nat (linear 1 3)
  pure $ fromNat n

genPix : Gen Pix
genPix = do
  a <- genNode
  b <- genNode
  pure $ MkPix a b

genMaxel : Gen Maxel
genMaxel = do
  pixels <- list (linear 0 4) genPix
  pure $ MkMaxel pixels

prop_transpose_involution : Property
prop_transpose_involution = property $ do
  m <- forAll genMaxel
  -- Any Maxel is a relation (directed multigraph)
  -- The transpose of the transpose is the original maxel!
  transposeMaxel (transposeMaxel m) === m

main : IO ()
main = do
  success <- checkGroup $ MkGroup "Relations"
    [ ("prop_transpose_involution", prop_transpose_involution) ]
  if success then putStrLn "SUCCESS" else putStrLn "FAILURE"
```
